channel.title: petk/awesome-dojo Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Oct 29th - Nov 4th, 2018
item.description:
DojoToolkit.org resources and documentation

  • Roadmap Dojo Roadmap (all versions)

    • Community

  • Reddit Community - growing community discussing Dojo on Reddit (invitation-only).

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Feb 6th - Feb 12th, 2017
item.description:
Community

  • Meetup - Get involved locally and find local user groups.

    • Packages, libraries and scripts

  • xaction - Component providing UI and logic for user actions.

    • Applications

  • xamiro - IDE alike file manager in PHP and JavaScript with minimal dependencies.
  • Windows-dist - Full automation suite for IoT and prototyping.

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2016
item.description:
DojoToolkit.org resources and documentation

  • Reference guidestars90 - http://dojotoolkit.org/reference-guide/1.10/
  • API - API reference for Dojo Toolkit
  • Blog - Dojo Toolkit Blog
  • Demos - Dojo Toolkit Demos

    • Testing

  • Intern Yeoman generatorstars2 - Yeoman generator - Intern

    • TypeScript

  • Definitive TypeScript Guide - A guide about features and functionalities of TypeScript

    • Packages, libraries and scripts

    Dojo 2

  • Dojo loaderstars13 - AMD loader for Dojo2.

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Jul 4th - Jul 10th, 2016
item.description:
DojoToolkit.org resources and documentation

  • Dojo Metastars223 - Dojo 2 contribution and coding guidelines
  • Dojo Websitestars4 - Website for Dojo Toolkit 1.x to 2.x transition

    • Packages, libraries and scripts

  • grunt-dojo2stars4 - Build Dojo2 inside a Grunt task

    • Packages, libraries and scripts

    Dojo 2

  • Dojo corestars215 - Dojo 2 package containing TypeScript and JavaScript core utilities
  • DOM Utilitiesstars12 - Dojo2 DOM Utilities
  • Dojo Command Line Toolingstars20 - Command Line Tooling for Dojo2 Applications
  • Dojo routingstars14 - Dojo2 Routing
  • Dojo composestars8 - Dojo2 Composition Library
  • Dojo widgetsstars77 - A core UI component library for Dojo 2
  • Dojo hasstars3 - A feature detection library
  • Dojo shimstars14 - Modules that provide modular fills of ES6+ functionality
  • Dojo parsestars3 - A package for declaratively instantiating widgets.
  • Dojo2 Appstars7 - An application framework for Dojo 2 (example)

    • Applications

  • Dojo2 Examplestars72 - Dojo 2 Examples

    • TypeScript

  • Dojo Typingsstars28 - A repository of Dojo 1 TypeScript Typings (including Dijit and DojoX)

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Nov 30th - Dec 6th, 2015
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Dojo and Bootstrap FAQ - how to use Bootstrap with Dijit
  • Pluralsight's Dojo tutorial - Video tutorials for learning Dojo Toolkit

    • Bootstraps and boilerplates

  • dboostrapstars145 - Bootstrap theme for Dojo

    • Applications

  • js-doc-parsestars12 - Library for parsing dojo JavaScript files and extracting inline documentation

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Oct 5th - Oct 11th, 2015
item.description:
Community

  • IRC - Large and active IRC support channel.

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Sep 7th - Sep 13th, 2015
item.description:
Other Awesome Lists

  • awesome-javascript-booksstars119 - awesome JavaScript books
  • awesome-javascriptstars23.9k - awesome JavaScript list
  • awesome lists:
    • awesomestars164.9k - awesome list
    • awesome-awesomestars1.8k - awesome list
    • GetAwesomeness - awesome lists
    • listsstars7.3k - awesome lists
    • awesome-allstars156 - awesome lists
    • awesome-awesomestars224 - awesome lists

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Aug 31st - Sep 6th, 2015
item.description:
Themes

  • Semantic Dojo Theme - A responsive Dojo theme that harnesses the style awesomeness of Semantic UI Framework.

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Jul 20th - Jul 26th, 2015
item.description:
Testing

  • Intern User guide - A quite complete manual about how to use The Intern
  • Intern Yeoman page objectsstars1 - A Yeoman generator to create unit test and suites

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2015
item.description:
Applications

  • dapistars12 - node.js Dojo API viewer

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Feb 23rd - Mar 1st, 2015
item.description:
Themes

  • Flat Dojo Theme - Esri Flat Dijit Design

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Feb 16th - Feb 22nd, 2015
item.description:
Packages, libraries and scripts

  • dojo-smorestars30 - package with Dojo/Store implementation
  • delitestars69 - HTML Custom Element / Widget infrastructure
  • delitefulstars70 - Multichannel (desktop/mobile) UI Custom Elements Library
  • Leadfootstars169 - A JavaScript client library that brings cross-platform consistency to the Selenium WebDriver API

    • Themes

  • dijit-claro-stylusstars25 - A straight conversion of Dijit's Claro theme from LESS to Stylus.

    • Applications

  • Dig Dugstars46 - A JavaScript library for launching WebDriver service tunnels

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Feb 2nd - Feb 8th, 2015
item.description:
Bootstraps and boilerplates

  • dojo-node-boilerplatestars17 - A quickstart "template" for using Dojo Toolkit on NodeJS

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Jan 12th - Jan 18th, 2015
item.description:
Bootstraps and boilerplates

  • dojo.jsstars15 - Minimalistic boilerplate to start your dojo with Jasmine and Gulp.

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Nov 24th - Nov 30th, 2014
item.description:
Serverside integrations

  • Dojangostars64 - Dojo and Django Python framework integration

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Nov 3rd - Nov 9th, 2014
item.description:
Community

  • SensioLabs Connect Club - Sensiolabs Connect Dojo Toolkit Club for PHP and Symfony developers

    • Applications

  • rstwikistars27 - Simple reST/wiki system built with Python and Dojo Toolkit

    • Packages, libraries and scripts

  • karma-dojostars1 - A Karma plugin. Adapter for Dojo Toolkit.

    • TypeScript

  • Dojo to Typescript Converterstars9 - A typescript script which creates typescript compatible declarations from a dojo api.json file.
  • Dojo-TypeScriptstars13 - Using Dojo 1.9 AMD-style with Microsoft TypeScript 0.9.5

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Oct 27th - Nov 2nd, 2014
item.description:
Serverside integrations

  • Java
    • Dojofaces - project that assists JSF developers in connecting Dojo widgets with JSF backing beans
    • DWR - library that enables Java on the server and JavaScript in a browser
    • Grails - open source full stack web application framework that has support for Dojo with plugin
    • LightStreamer - Server with Dojo integrated
    • Spring - How to integrate Spring and Dojo
    • Websphere - Application server has Dojo integrated
  • ASP.NET
    • Dojo & ASP.NET - DataGrid View with Sorting and Paging using Dojo EnhancedGrid, JsonRest Store, Entity Framework, SQL Server, ASP.NET MVC Web API
    • Dojo.NETstars3 - .NET class library that provides WebControl bindings to ASP.NET websites (both WebForms and MVC, including Razor) using the Dojo toolkit.
    • Reactive Extensionsstars10 - Reactive Extensions bindings for the Dojo Toolkit
  • Node.js
    • dojo-nodestars7 - Lightwave Dojo wrapper for Node.js
    • Dojosstars11 - Server side dojo on NodeJS
    • Node.js integration - Tutorial how to use Dojo and Node.js
  • PHP
    • Dojo & Composerstars3 - custom Composer installers for zoop packages including Dojo
    • Dojo & Symfony PHP framework - integrating Dojo Toolkit with Symfony PHP framework
    • Dojo & Zend PHP frameworkstars9 - integrating Dojo Toolkit with Zend Framework through DojoModule

    • Applications

  • Scripted - Scripted is a fast and lightweight code editor with an initial focus on JavaScript editing

item.title: petk/awesome-dojo Oct 20th - Oct 26th, 2014
item.description:
Packages, libraries and scripts

  • Grids
    • dgrid - next-generation grid component that takes full advantage of modern browsers and object stores.
    • gridx - A fast rendering, well modularized and plugin architecture based Grid.
    • xgrid - dgrid extensions.
  • AngularJS Dojostars34 - AngularJS directives for dojo widgets
  • generator-dojostars38 - A yeoman generator for Dojo projects
  • grunt-dojostars33 - Build Dojo inside a Grunt task
  • Dojo Foundation packages - Packages available on Dojo Foundation
  • Sitepen dstorestars273 - Data infrastructure framework, providing the tools for modelling and interacting with data collections and objects.

    • Serverside integrations

  • dojo-rails - Dojo and Ruby on Rails framework integration
  • Dojo Mavenstars3 - Maven packaging of the Dojo Toolkit

    • Community

  • Linked In Dojo Ajax Toolkit Developers Group - Dojo Community on LinkedIn
  • Linked In Dojo Toolkit Group - Dojo Community on LinkedIn
  • Dojo on StackOverflow - Dojo Toolkit support on StackOverflow
  • Brazilian Facebook Group - Brazilian Dojo Community on Facebook
  • Google Plus Community - Dojo community on Google Plus
  • Dojo mailing list - mailing list for questions and discussions
  • Dojo on Twitter - Dojo's Twitter account
  • Facebook Group - Dojo community on Facebook

    • Testing

  • Intern - A next-generation code testing stack for JavaScript.

    • DojoToolkit.org resources and documentation

  • Tutorials - authorized and updated tutorials for Dojo Toolkit

    • Tutorials

  • Dojo Toolkit 1.9 tutorialstars25 - A tutorial using Dojo Toolkit 1.9
  • Dojo the Good partsstars34 - ESRI Developer Summit Presentation held March 10-13th 2014 in Palm Springs.

    • Bootstraps and boilerplates

  • Dojo Boilerplatestars376 - A starting boilerplate for developing with Dojo Toolkit
  • Dojo Twitter bootstrapstars176 - An implementation of the Twitter Bootstrap framework using Dojo

    • Applications

  • dojoramastars47 - Single page demo application based on Dojo 1.9, Twitter Bootstrap 3 and history API
  • AuShadastars64 - Django and Dojo application for Electronic Medical Records (EMR) and Public Health Management
  • todomvcstars27.3k - Helping you select an MV* framework - todo app examples
  • Dojo Demostars56 - Dojo demo
  • Dojox applicationstars27 - Dojox Application Framework for mobile, tablets, and desktops
